code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut p = 0
mut n = 0
mut buf = ""
mut i = 0
let total = string.len(line)

while i <= total
  mut is_ws = false
  mut cur = 0
  if i == total
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      cur = b
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(buf)
      match string.parse_int(buf)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          p = p + v
        end
        if v < 0
          n = n + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      buf = ""
    end
  else
    buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(cur)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

let r = p - n
print("r=#{r}")
